composer: Jun Chuma, Kenichi Matsubara, Yasuhiko Manno
notes: No tempo, key, chord progression, or SFX characteristic data documented in available sources. Wikipedia identifies three composers (Jun Chuma, Kenichi Matsubara, Yasuhiko Manno) as part of Konami Kukeiha Club. Matsubara noted as primary credited composer with prior Castlevania II and Contra Force experience. Game uses Konami VRC4 custom chip. TCRF source mentions sound test in options menu but provides no musical parameters. Soundtrack later included in Konami Shooting Collection (2011).
